description: A Wind Energy Operations Manager needs to validate the performance of a 1.5MW turbine following a gearbox maintenance event. Using the high-frequency SCADA logs in 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\turbine_scada.csv', create a Power BI report named 'Turbine_Performance.pbix' that constructs an IEC 61400-12 Power Curve. The report must filter the data for records where 'Status_Code' is 'OK' and include a calculated column named 'Wind_Bin' that rounds 'Wind_Speed_ms' down to the nearest integer. Define a DAX measure named 'Avg_Power' for the average of 'Power_kW'. The final report should feature a line chart showing 'Avg_Power' by 'Wind_Bin' and a scatter chart showing 'Power_kW' by 'Wind_Speed_ms'. Save the completed report to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Turbine_Performance.pbix.
